seo.title: Building Django REST Framework patterns with Django REST...
seo.description: A step-by-step implementation guide for Django REST Framework patterns with Django REST Framework and Celery.

content.intro: Build a scalable Django application with async support, AI integration, and containerized deployment. This guide focuses on practical implementation of architecture decisions from setup to production.

steps.title: Initialize project structure with async support
steps.explanation: Create a new Django project and configure ASGI for async capabilities. Add core apps for database, tasks, and API interfaces.

code.content:
django-admin startproject myproject
 cd myproject
 python -m venv venv
 source venv/bin/activate
 pip install django psycopg2-binary redis docker

steps.title: Configure PostgreSQL and Redis connections
steps.explanation: Set up DATABASES and CACHES settings with production-ready parameters. Validate connection parameters match your environment.

steps.title: Implement async view patterns
steps.explanation: Create an ASGI application with async views. Use async def for I/O-bound operations and ensure proper middleware configuration.

code.content:
from django.http import JsonResponse
from asgiref.sync import sync_to_async

async def async_view(request):
    data = await sync_to_async(MyModel.objects.all)()
    return JsonResponse({'data': data})

# In asgi.py
application = get_asgi_application()

steps.title: Integrate AI model inference
steps.explanation: Load a pre-trained model in a background task worker. Use Redis for task queuing and ensure model persistence between requests.

steps.title: Containerize with Docker
steps.explanation: Create a production-ready Docker image with Gunicorn and Nginx. Configure environment variables for database and Redis connections.

code.content:
FROM python:3.10-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt requirements.txt
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["gunicorn", "myproject.wsgi:application", "--bind", "0.0.0.0:8000"]

steps.title: Configure ASGI scaling
steps.explanation: Set up Gunicorn with ASGI workers for concurrent request handling. Adjust worker processes based on CPU cores.

content.conclusion: This implementation provides a foundation for Django applications requiring async processing, AI integration, and scalable deployment. Validate each component with load testing and monitor performance metrics in production.
